test.name: Cadastro com dados do banco sucesso

kw.name: Open Browser

kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Connect To Database
kw.msg: Connect to DB using : mysql.connector.connect(database='robotdb', user=***, password=***, host='localhost', port=3306)
kw.doc: Creates a database connection using the DB API 2.0 ``db_module`` and the parameters provided. Along with listed commonly used arguments (`db_name`, `db_host` etc.) you can set any other DB module specific parameters as key/value pairs.

kw.name: Query
kw.msg: Arguments: [ "SELECT nome, email, senha FROM usuarios WHERE nome='telma'" ]

Executing sql:
SELECT nome, email, senha FROM usuarios WHERE nome='telma'

Query returned 1 rows
Rownomeemailsenha
0Telmatelma@email.com123456
kw.arg: SELECT nome, email, senha FROM usuarios WHERE nome='${nome}'
kw.doc: Runs a query with the ``select_statement`` and returns the result as list of rows. The type of row values depends on the database module - usually they are tuples or tuple-like objects.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Dado que o usuário está na página inicial
Go To
kw.msg: Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":null} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '14', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.msg: Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":true} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '14', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":null} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '14', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":null} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '14', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":null} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '14', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":null} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '14', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Remote response: status=200 | data={"value":null} | headers=HTTPHeaderDict({'Content-Length': '14', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'cache-control': 'no-cache'})
